data.name: Horror of the Broken Lands

Whenever you cycle or discard another card, this creature gets +2/+1 until end of turn.

data.name: Ihsan's Shade
data.oracle_text: Protection from white
data.flavor_text:
"Ihsan, the weak. Ihsan, the fallen. Ihsan, the betrayer. He has brought shame to the Serra paladins where none existed before. May his suffering equal his betrayal."
ÔÇöBaris, Serra inquisitor

data.name: Immoral Bargain
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice X creatures.
Destroy X target nonland permanents.

Copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. If this spell was cast from a graveyard, copy that spell twice instead. You may choose new targets for the copies.

data.name: Inescapable Brute
data.oracle_text:
Wither (This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)
This creature must be blocked if able.
data.flavor_text: If you think you made it past him alive, he's just teasing you.

data.name: Ingot Chewer
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, destroy target artifact.
Evoke {R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)
data.flavor_text: Elementals are ideas given form. This one is the idea of "smashitude."

data.name: Jace's Archivist
data.oracle_text: {U}, {T}: Each player discards their hand, then draws cards equal to the greatest number of cards a player discarded this way.
data.flavor_text: "This is a sacred duty. Master Beleren's trust has bought an eternity of my loyalty."

Kicker {5}{B} (You may pay an additional {5}{B} as you cast this spell.)
Menace

data.name: Juxtapose
data.oracle_text: You and target player exchange control of the creature you each control with the greatest mana value. Then exchange control of artifacts the same way. If two or more permanents a player controls are tied for greatest, their controller chooses one of them.

data.name: Knight of the White Orchid
data.oracle_text:
First strike
When this creature enters, if an opponent controls more lands than you, you may search your library for a Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

data.oracle_text:
Flying
When Kokusho dies, each opponent loses 5 life. You gain life equal to the life lost this way.
data.flavor_text: The fall of the evening star never heralds a gentle dawn.

When this creature enters, target player loses 6 life.
When this creature leaves the battlefield, that player gains 6 life.
{B}: Regenerate this creature.
data.flavor_text: Chainer's dark gift to a darker soul.

data.name: Lazotep Behemoth
data.flavor_text:
"I know I should be more concerned. But a big, blue zombie-potamus from beyond the stars? This is what they're invading us with?"

data.flavor_text: Freed from their chains, these dwarves are bound only by honor.

data.name: Lightwalker

"The greatest gift Dromoka gives is the ability to fly without wings."

data.name: Live Fast

data.name: Lys Alana Scarblade

data.flavor_text: In beauty-obsessed Lys Alana, one cut of her blade means the difference between a high society feast and raking through the dungheap for scraps.

{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

data.flavor_text: He has slain a dozen witches, luring each with a promise of fresh children's bones.

Lifelink

data.flavor_text: The surviving members of the Markov bloodline drove through a crush of horrors to reclaim their ancestral home.

Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from that player's graveyard or hand and exile it.

This creature can't block unless you control more creatures than attacking player.

data.name: Murder
data.oracle_text: Destroy target creature.
data.flavor_text: Laughter and conversation trailed off as the revelers gathered around Zegana's body. Three things quickly became clear: it was a murder, the killer was likely among them, and Teysa's party was definitely over.

data.name: Odric, Lunarch Marshal

Flying

Enchant creature

Target player discards a card.

data.flavor_text: It plucks away memories like choice bits of carrion.

data.name: Read the Runes
data.oracle_text: Draw X cards. For each card drawn this way, discard a card unless you sacrifice a permanent.
data.flavor_text: "The world is a puzzle, and the mind is its key."

data.name: Reality Shift
data.oracle_text: Exile target creature. Its controller manifests the top card of their library. (That player puts the top card of their library onto the battlefield face down as a 2/2 creature. If it's a creature card, it can be turned face up any time for its mana cost.)

data.name: Reap Intellect
data.oracle_text: Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose up to X nonland cards from it and exile them. For each card exiled this way, search that player's graveyard, hand, and library for any number of cards with the same name as that card and exile them. Then that player shuffles.

data.name: Reckless Racer

First strike

data.flavor_text: Illegal street races turned out to be perfect practice for avoiding Consulate patrols.
